headline: Broadridge Adds Capital Markets President As Valuation Lags Analyst Targets
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) has appointed Frank Troise as President of Global Capital Markets. The move expands the company’s executive leadership and front office capabilities across global capital markets. Broadridge Financial Solutions, trading at around $187.51, sits at an interesting point for investors who watch execution and leadership decisions closely. The stock is up 5.5% over the past week but shows a 4.9% decline over the past 30 days and a 14.9% decline year to...
